'''R2-M3''' was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] used as a [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] "[[Captain/Legends|captain]]" for the [[Tech 4 PDV]] used by [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]]. It was based on the [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]].

{{Droid-stub}}
